news.title:
Birla Corp's capacity rises to 21.4M tons, aiming 27.6M by FY29 at Rs 300 crore cost.
Q3 FY26 net profit surged 69.2% to Rs 52.8 crore; revenue fell 4.3% to Rs 2,158.7 crore.
news.summary:
Birla Corp's capacity rises to 21.4M tons, aiming 27.6M by FY29 at Rs 300 crore cost.
Q3 FY26 net profit surged 69.2% to Rs 52.8 crore; revenue fell 4.3% to Rs 2,158.7 crore.

news.title:
Birla Corporation's Kundanganj grinding unit capacity grew by 1.4 MT.
Consolidated capacity reaches 21.4 MT; expansion by RCCPL boosts UP market.
news.summary:
Birla Corporation's Kundanganj grinding unit capacity grew by 1.4 MT.
Consolidated capacity reaches 21.4 MT; expansion by RCCPL boosts UP market.

news.title:
Birla Corp plans to reach 24.2 MT capacity by FY2028, 27.6 MT by FY2029.
EBITDA per ton lags competitors due to older plants, high northern costs.
news.summary:
Birla Corp plans to reach 24.2 MT capacity by FY2028, 27.6 MT by FY2029.
EBITDA per ton lags competitors due to older plants, high northern costs.

news.title:
Birla Corp expects 4-5% volume growth this quarter, aligning with industry trends.
Capex for 9M FY26 is INR 300 cr; full-year capex likely below earlier guidance.
news.summary:
Birla Corp expects 4-5% volume growth this quarter, aligning with industry trends.
Capex for 9M FY26 is INR 300 cr; full-year capex likely below earlier guidance.

news.title:
Birla Corp expects fuel costs to rise slightly to INR 1.5/1000 kcal in Q4 FY2026.
Kundanganj Line 3 operations are set to commence this quarter.
news.summary:
Birla Corp expects fuel costs to rise slightly to INR 1.5/1000 kcal in Q4 FY2026.
Kundanganj Line 3 operations are set to commence this quarter.

news.title:
Birla Corporation plans 1.4 mn tons Kundanganj Line 3 in Q4 FY26.
The company targets 27.6 mn tons capacity by FY29.
news.summary:
Birla Corporation plans 1.4 mn tons Kundanganj Line 3 in Q4 FY26.
The company targets 27.6 mn tons capacity by FY29.

news.title:
Birla Corporation's Q3 net profit rose 71% to Rs 53 crore; EBITDA up 18% to Rs 312 crore.
Cement sales volume fell 6%, revenue declined 4%, and Jute division faced cost-driven losses.
news.summary:
Birla Corporation's Q3 net profit rose 71% to Rs 53 crore; EBITDA up 18% to Rs 312 crore.
Cement sales volume fell 6%, revenue declined 4%, and Jute division faced cost-driven losses.

news.title:
Birla Corporation Ltd approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ending 31 Dec 2025, reporting total income of ₹2,177.9 Cr for Q3.
The board extended terms of Chief Marketing Officer Kalidas Pramanik and Head HR Rajesh Kakkar, with recommendations from Nomination and Remuneration Committee.
news.summary:
Birla Corporation Ltd approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ending 31 Dec 2025, reporting total income of ₹2,177.9 Cr for Q3.
The board extended terms of Chief Marketing Officer Kalidas Pramanik and Head HR Rajesh Kakkar, with recommendations from Nomination and Remuneration Committee.

news.title:
Sun Pharma, GAIL India, IDFC First Bank, Birla Corporation, and others to announce Q3 results today, 31st Jan.
Companies like Bharat Dynamics, Delhivery, and Zen Technologies are also set to release Q3 financials.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma, GAIL India, IDFC First Bank, Birla Corporation, and others to announce Q3 results today, 31st Jan.
Companies like Bharat Dynamics, Delhivery, and Zen Technologies are also set to release Q3 financials.

news.title:
High Court rejects promoter shareholders' temporary requests of Birla Corp.
New Articles of Association to be implemented as appeals are resolved.
news.summary:
High Court rejects promoter shareholders' temporary requests of Birla Corp.
New Articles of Association to be implemented as appeals are resolved.

news.title:
Birla Corporation's board meeting on 31st Jan 2026 to review Q3 and 9-month financial results.
The standalone and consolidated unaudited results for Dec 2025 quarter to be considered.
news.summary:
Birla Corporation's board meeting on 31st Jan 2026 to review Q3 and 9-month financial results.
The standalone and consolidated unaudited results for Dec 2025 quarter to be considered.

news.title:
Birla Corporation faces a demand of ₹9.7 crore for deficit stamp duty and fees.
The company plans to appeal against the Madhya Pradesh authority's order.
news.summary:
Birla Corporation faces a demand of ₹9.7 crore for deficit stamp duty and fees.
The company plans to appeal against the Madhya Pradesh authority's order.

news.title:
JM Financial downgraded JK Cement and Birla Corp citing balanced risk-reward, market share concerns.
Intense competition from larger cement players may impact profitability in the medium term.
news.summary:
JM Financial downgraded JK Cement and Birla Corp citing balanced risk-reward, market share concerns.
Intense competition from larger cement players may impact profitability in the medium term.

news.title:
Birla Corporation was the preferred bidder for a limestone mining lease in Rajasthan.
Its bid of 20.6 was rejected for being lower than other regional auctions.
news.summary:
Birla Corporation was the preferred bidder for a limestone mining lease in Rajasthan.
Its bid of 20.6 was rejected for being lower than other regional auctions.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirms Birla Corporation Ltd's ₹200 crore commercial paper rating as CRISIL A1.
Details and rationale for the rating are available on the CRISIL website.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirms Birla Corporation Ltd's ₹200 crore commercial paper rating as CRISIL A1.
Details and rationale for the rating are available on the CRISIL website.

news.title:
Indian court dismisses two civil revision applications against Birla Corp.
This development clears legal hurdles, marking a positive for the company.
news.summary:
Indian court dismisses two civil revision applications against Birla Corp.
This development clears legal hurdles, marking a positive for the company.

news.title:
Birla Corporation Ltd's 103rd AGM voting results on Agenda Item 8, appointing Mr. Sudeep Roy as a Non-Executive Non-Independent Director, were published post Calcutta High Court's order.
The special resolution for Mr. Roy's appointment did not pass, with 65.2% votes against and 34.8% in favor.
news.summary:
Birla Corporation Ltd's 103rd AGM voting results on Agenda Item 8, appointing Mr. Sudeep Roy as a Non-Executive Non-Independent Director, were published post Calcutta High Court's order.
The special resolution for Mr. Roy's appointment did not pass, with 65.2% votes against and 34.8% in favor.

news.title:
Birla Corp sees sluggish demand in Oct-Nov, slight improvement in Dec.
FY26 volume growth is projected at 4%, EBITDA/ton to improve H2 over H1.
news.summary:
Birla Corp sees sluggish demand in Oct-Nov, slight improvement in Dec.
FY26 volume growth is projected at 4%, EBITDA/ton to improve H2 over H1.

news.title:
Birla Corporation Ltd certifies redemption of commercial paper worth ₹50 cr on 24 Nov 2025.
Timely payment ensured for commercial paper with ISIN INE340A14155 as per SEBI guidelines.
news.summary:
Birla Corporation Ltd certifies redemption of commercial paper worth ₹50 cr on 24 Nov 2025.
Timely payment ensured for commercial paper with ISIN INE340A14155 as per SEBI guidelines.

news.title:
Birla Corporation reported Q2, H1 FY26 financials, highlighted INR 20-25Cr clinker purchase impact.
Focus on premium, trade segments amid price pressures; FY26 capex guidance at INR 800Cr.
news.summary:
Birla Corporation reported Q2, H1 FY26 financials, highlighted INR 20-25Cr clinker purchase impact.
Focus on premium, trade segments amid price pressures; FY26 capex guidance at INR 800Cr.
